member.name: T:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Handles authentication: login, token refresh, and logout.

member.name: M:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.AuthController.Login(FinanceDashboard.Business.DTOs.Auth.LoginRequestDto)
member.summary: Login with email and password to receive JWT tokens.

member.name: M:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.AuthController.RefreshToken(FinanceDashboard.Business.DTOs.Auth.RefreshTokenRequestDto)
member.summary: Refresh access token using a valid refresh token.

member.name: M:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.AuthController.Logout
member.summary: Logout the currently authenticated user and invalidate their refresh token.

member.name: M:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.AuthController.Me
member.summary: Get currently authenticated user info from the JWT token.

member.name: T:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.DashboardController
member.summary: Aggregated analytics and dashboard summary endpoints. Accessible by all authenticated roles.

member.name: M:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.DashboardController.GetSummary(System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Get full dashboard summary: income, expenses, net balance, category totals, recent activity and monthly trends. [Admin, Analyst, Viewer]

member.name: M:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.DashboardController.GetTrends(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get monthly income vs expense trends. [Admin, Analyst]
member.param: How many past months to include (1–24, default 6)

member.name: M:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.DashboardController.GetCategoryBreakdown(System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Get spending breakdown by category with percentage share. [Admin, Analyst]

member.name: T:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.TransactionsController
member.summary: CRUD operations for financial transactions with filtering, pagination and search.

member.name: M:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.TransactionsController.GetAll(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: List transactions with optional filtering, search and pagination. [Admin, Analyst, Viewer]
member.param: Filter by type: Income or Expense

member.name: M:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.TransactionsController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a single transaction by ID. [Admin, Analyst, Viewer]

member.name: M:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.TransactionsController.Create(FinanceDashboard.Business.DTOs.Transactions.CreateTransactionDto)
member.summary: Create a new financial transaction. [Admin, Analyst]

member.name: M:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.TransactionsController.Update(System.Int32,FinanceDashboard.Business.DTOs.Transactions.UpdateTransactionDto)
member.summary: Update an existing transaction. [Admin, Analyst]

member.name: M:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.TransactionsController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Soft-delete a transaction. [Admin only]

member.name: T:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.UsersController
member.summary: Manage users and their roles. Admin-only unless noted.

member.name: M:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.UsersController.GetAll
member.summary: Get all users. [Admin only]

member.name: M:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.UsersController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a user by ID. [Admin only]

member.name: M:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.UsersController.Create(FinanceDashboard.Business.DTOs.Users.CreateUserDto)
member.summary: Create a new user. [Admin only]

member.name: M:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.UsersController.Update(System.Int32,FinanceDashboard.Business.DTOs.Users.UpdateUserDto)
member.summary: Update a user. [Admin only]

member.name: M:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.UsersController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Soft-delete a user. [Admin only]

member.name: M:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.UsersController.SetStatus(System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Activate or deactivate a user. [Admin only]

member.name: M:FinanceDashboard.API.Controllers.UsersController.ChangePassword(FinanceDashboard.Business.DTOs.Users.ChangePasswordDto)
member.summary: Change the authenticated user's own password.

member.name: T:FinanceDashboard.API.Filters.RequireRoleAttribute
member.summary: Restricts access to users with one of the specified roles. Usage: [RequireRole("Admin")] or [RequireRole("Admin","Analyst")]
